understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level while avoiding spike tiles (u/v). Complete all levels efficiently within the turn budget (50 turns per attempt, 2 attempts per level).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal-only via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; after each move, automatic gravity-fall occurs until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. Clicks remove breakable blocks (x) to open fall paths. Spikes end the run on landing. Gravity direction (up/down) determines fall trajectory—y increases downward, so DOWN gravity falls toward lower y. UNDO reverts the previous action for recovery.
